Data sources and update dates are shown in the app.

feedback.Feedback: Build a trackable project board. Every completed phase or small goal must be recorded. Every feedback and modification must leave records for rollback.

"Project board items disappeared from the dashboard" — `dashboard_data.json` showed `goal: ""` and 0 items for every project because `build_dashboard_v2.py` regex required `**bold**` `Goal` / `Exit criteria` / `Initial tasks` / `Evidence` headings but the project boards used plain headings.

changes.Change: Created the initial project tracking board and documentation structure.
changes.Rollback: Revert initial project-board files or restore from the first git checkpoint

changes.Change: Initialized local git versioning and recorded the first rollback checkpoint.
changes.Rollback: Revert the checkpoint-record update commit; keep or remove `.git` depending on whether version history is still needed

changes.Change: Fixed the `Goal` / `Exit criteria` / `Initial tasks` / `Evidence` regex in `build_dashboard_v2.py` so it matches plain (non-`**bold**`) project-board headings, and made all four regexes accept either bold or plain form via `(?: \*\*)?` while tolerating leading indent on bullets. This is why `dashboard_data.json` had `goal: ""` and zero items for every project in v1. Added 4 entries / 9 sections / 6 phases back into the dashboard. Also added `lang="zh-CN"` + EN ↔ 中 toggle button + `data-i18n` attribute scaffolding (`pageTitle`, `appName`, `tagline`, `generated` prefix) in v2.
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `build_dashboard_v2.py` (lines ~85-138), `dashboard.html` (head + header + `templates/i18n.js` not yet wired), `dashboard_data.json` (rebuilt with full content), new file `build_dashboard_v2.py.sv` saved before v1 and v2 writes
changes.Rollback: Restore `.bak` and `.sv` files, run `python3 build_dashboard.py` instead of v2 to confirm v1 produces the old (broken) shape, or revert commit

changes.Change: User accepted the 7-file tracking workflow as-is. Workflow baseline frozen: 7-file structure (ROADMAP / KANBAN / LOGBOOK / CHANGES / FEEDBACK / DECISIONS / ROLLBACK) + ID-prefix cross-link convention (SAT-/LOG-/CHG-/FB-/DEC-/RB-) + 3-level rollback (RB-001 to RB-004) + parser-driven dashboard confirmed as the project's working contract. SAT-005 moved from Review → Done.
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `KANBAN.md` (SAT-005 row in Done), `LOGBOOK.md` (LOG-003), `CHANGES.md` (this row), `FEEDBACK.md` (FB-001 will follow)
changes.Rollback: Move SAT-005 back to Review in `KANBAN.md` and reverse the rows; no data/asset/code changes happened

changes.Change: Fixed incomplete CHG-003 fix: parser regex leading `**` group changed from `(?:\*\*)` (mandatory) to `(?:\*\*)?` (optional) so plain `Goal:` / `Exit criteria:` / `Initial tasks:` headings in `ROADMAP.md` actually match. Also removed duplicate `<button id="lang-toggle">` (the second one inside `<span class="meta">` was non-functional because `getElementById` only returns the first match). Phase 0-5 now each show 1 goal + 4-5 exit criteria in the dashboard.
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `build_dashboard_v2.py` (phase regex lines), `dashboard.html` (regenerated), `dashboard_data.json` (rebuilt with full phase content)

changes.Change: Locked MVP scope draft v0.1 in DEC-003: 1U CubeSat reference model + 10 atlas entries (ISS / Hubble / JWST / Starlink v2 mini / GPS III / GOES-18 / Sentinel-2 / Landsat-9 / NOAA-20 / 1U CubeSat) + LEO/MEO/GEO/SSO orbit visual demo (no SGP4 in MVP per DEC-001) + 1U design sandbox stub (educational budget only per DEC-002). SAT-001 moved Next → In Progress with Patrick listed as reviewer.
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `DECISIONS.md` (DEC-003 row), `KANBAN.md` (SAT-001 row), `LOGBOOK.md` (LOG-004 row), `dashboard.html` (regenerated to reflect new kanban state)
changes.Rollback: Move SAT-001 back to Next in `KANBAN.md`, remove DEC-003 from `DECISIONS.md`, remove LOG-004 from `LOGBOOK.md`

changes.Change: Locked MVP tech stack in DEC-004: single-file HTML + three.js (CDN) + raw CSS + vanilla JS. Rejected React/Vite/Vue for setup overhead; rejected Web Components for ergonomic tax at this scale. 3D CubeSat model uses primitive geometry (Box/Cylinder) — no GLTF needed. Deploy path = same `cp` as dashboard.html.
changes.Rollback: Remove DEC-004 from `DECISIONS.md`, remove LOG-005 from `LOGBOOK.md`, no code/data changes happened

changes.Change: Built `mvp.html` v0.1 skeleton per DEC-004 + DEC-005. Single-file HTML, 4 tabs (CubeSat / Atlas / Orbit / Sandbox), three.js scene with 1U CubeSat primitive geometry, atlas cards listing 10 satellites from DEC-003 (placeholder data), orbit viz with Earth + 3 rings (LEO/MEO/GEO; SSO highlighted separately), sandbox form (subsystem selectors, no budget calc yet). DEC-005 inline subsystem taxonomy (6 subsystems + 1 payload slot). SAT-006 → In Progress; SAT-001 stays In Progress pending DEC-003 ⚠️ pick confirm.

Polish round 1: TDZ fix (hoist let declarations above setTab), `lookAt(0,0,0)` on all 3 cameras, dedupe `initCube()` double-call, fixed CubeSat click/explode/reset interactions, sandbox camera distance + FOV. Plus Phase 3 polish: 7 subsystem description cards (mass/power/function/spec/example) with click-sync between 3D and panel, 2-column layout, procedural canvas textures for solar panels (cell grid), PCB green for OBC, thermal fins, antenna feed horn, payload camera lens. 3-light setup (key/fill/rim). Idle rotation.

Polish round 2 — `all 3` (Atlas real data + i18n modal + live ISS): (1) 10 atlas cards now have real Wikipedia-sourced mass/power/agency/year/mission/wiki URL. ISS 419.7 t, Hubble 11.1 t, JWST 6.2 t, Starlink v2 mini 800 kg, GPS III 2.2 t, GOES-18 5.2 t, Sentinel-2 1.1 t, Landsat-9 2.7 t, NOAA-20 2.5 t, 1U CubeSat 1 kg. (2) Atlas modal full i18n — added `atlasAgency/Orbit/Alt/Mass/Power/Year/Mission/Source` keys zh+en, replaced inline `isZh ? '机构' : 'Agency'` with `t()` calls. Cards re-render on language toggle. (3) Live ISS position via CelesTrak GP (NORAD 25544) — orange emissive dot moves on LEO ring using simple Keplerian advancement from EPOCH + mean motion. HUD shows `🛰️ ISS live (CelesTrak YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MMZ)`. Refresh every 30 min. **No SGP4** per DEC-001 staged approach — Keplerian mean-anomaly advancement is enough for visual demo. (4) Modal also has Wikipedia source link in new section.
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `mvp.html` (ATLAS data + i18n + orbit live), `I18N` (8 new keys zh+en), `dashboard.html` (regenerated)

changes.Change: Polish round 3 — realistic 1U CubeSat: 27 parts (was 7), 4 corner rails (anodized aluminum with mounting holes), 4 deployable monopole antennas, star tracker baffle + RBF pin + 4 sun sensors + 3 magnetorquer coils + 2 Kapton heater strips, payload camera on -Z. Plus: per-satellite distinct 3D models in atlas modal — ISS with 6 modules + Canadarm2 + Cupola, GPS III with L-shaped solar wings + L-band antenna array, GOES-18 with ABI imager + magnetometer boom, JWST with 19 hex mirror segments (with visible gaps) + backplane + fine guidance sensor, Starlink with star tracker + antennas, Sentinel-2 with MSI + radiator, Landsat-9 with TIRS + OLI dual instruments, NOAA-20 with VIIRS + CrIS. 4 archetype generators (iss/hubble/jwst/starlink) + 5 specialized (gps/goes/sentinel2/landsat/noaa20) + generic boxSat + cube1u. `highlightPart()` pulses ALL parts sharing same sub-system name. Modal lighting upgraded to 3-light sun setup (key 1.4, fill 0.35, rim 0.18) for sharper shadows. ISS got Soyuz + Dragon docking vehicles.
changes.Rollback: `git revert RB-016` reverts realistic 1U; `git revert RB-018` reverts per-satellite models

changes.Change: Atlas modal 3D preview framework: built `generateSatModel(sat)` switch routing 10 satellites to specialized generators, `loadSatGLB(sat)` with 404-fallback to procedural, `exportToGLB(group)` for testing pipeline. Added `getSatGLBUrl(sat)` pattern (slug from sat.id). Created `models/` directory with README.md documenting Meshy.ai / Tripo3D / TripoSR / Hunyuan3D / Luma / Rodin integration steps and file naming convention. Modal shows status badge: `🛰 GLB model` if loaded from URL, `⚙ procedural` otherwise. Tested export→reload cycle: GLTFExporter writes binary GLB blob, GLTFLoader reads it back successfully. **Pipeline ready for Patrick to drop Meshy-generated GLBs in `models/sat-{slug}.glb`.**

Orbit demo upgraded from single-line rings to **altitude band ranges** per DEC-003. Each orbit type (LEO 300-1500, MEO 5000-25000, GEO 35500-36100, SSO 600-900 km) is now rendered as 2 boundary rings + translucent fill between. Added canvas sprite labels per sample satellite with orbit-color background pill. `sampleGroup` sub-group auto-rotates dots + labels with the band, fixing manual rotation math for SSO tilt. Removed old orbit-name sprite labels (replaced by per-sample names).

NASA reference photos integrated into atlas modal. Searched `images-api.nasa.gov` (NASA official image API) for each of 10 satellites, got real iconic photos (ISS spacewalk, JWST deployment, GOES-R transport, etc.). Added `nasaImageId` field to each ATLAS entry + `nasaImageUrl(id, size)` helper. Modal now shows real NASA photo below 3D model (max-height 120px thumbnail, clickable to open full-size on NASA Images). Total 10 satellite-image pairs verified. **Note: NASA's 3D Resources API moved to science.nasa.gov/3d-resources/ but has no JSON API — could not auto-discover GLB URLs. Pipeline (RB-019) ready for Patrick to drop manual GLBs.**
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `mvp.html` (nasaImageId fields, modal HTML), `models/README.md` (updated with NASA image sourcing note)

changes.Change: NASA photo thumbnail polish: changed modal layout from full-width photo to 16:9 thumbnail (max-height 120px) with `aspect-ratio` + `object-fit: cover`. Image wrapped in `<a href="https://images.nasa.gov/details-{id}">` so click opens full-size on NASA Images. Hover: scale(1.02) + accent border + soft shadow. Modal flow more compact. Also backfilled CHG-009..014 entries in CHANGES.md with full audit trail (What/Why/Tasks/Feedback/Files/Rollback) for all RB-* commits that weren't documented at commit time.

Sandbox 3D preview reactive: rewrote `updateSandboxPreview()` so ALL 5 dropdowns drive real 3D changes (not just EPS+ADCS). EPS: 0/4/8 panels (body/deploy/gauntlet + wing tips + booms). OBC: 3 board sizes (arm-c0 small / arm-a53 + SOIC chip / SoC + heat sink + fins + 2nd chip). ADCS: 0/3 magnetorquer tori/3 reaction wheels + star tracker. Comms: UHF whip / S-band patch+dipole / X-band dish on boom. Payload: camera (body+hood+lens) / IoT (box+LoRa whip) / SSR (long box+dipole) / AIS (pink box+long VHF whip). Budget formula reworked to per-subsystem mass/power lookup tables. Mission-fit detection expanded to 5 modes (EO imaging / IoT store-and-fwd / Maritime tracking / Ham radio relay / Over 1U mass limit). Added OrbitControls in sandbox so user can drag-rotate + scroll-zoom; auto-rotation continues while idle.
changes.Rollback: `git revert RB-025` reverts sandbox 3D; `git revert RB-026` reverts controls

changes.Change: Sandbox budget transparency: replaced single-line mass/power numbers with per-subsystem breakdown rows showing which subsystem contributes how much. Each row has a dotted-underline hover hint and `title=` tooltip explaining the calculation (e.g., "0.55 kg = 4 main + 4 tip + 4 booms
changes.Files/Areas Affected: 11 W = 8 × 1.2 W peak + battery 2 W"). All 14 tooltips (6 mass + 5 power + 1 structure) translated to zh + en, sourced from real CubeSat product specs (Pumpkin Kit, ISIS iOBC, EnduroSat EPS, BlueCanyon XACT). New sources row at bottom: "**Sources:** Pumpkin Kit / ISIS iOBC / EnduroSat EPS / BlueCanyon XACT (educational estimates, not engineering validation)". DEC-002 compliance: still no real engineering validation, all values are educational lookup tables.

changes.Change: 3D CubeSat hover-pick sync: added mousemove + mouseleave handlers to 3D canvas. Hovering over a 3D part now highlights the matching sub-card in the right panel (transient, not persistent). Hovering a sub-card pulses the matching 3D part(s) with a 1.12x scale animation. Click remains the persistent selection. Refactored click handler to use shared `pickAt()` function. Added `.sub-card:hover` border + box-shadow for clearer hover state.
changes.Files/Areas Affected: `mvp.html` (initCube hover + pickAt + pulsePart + delegated sub-card hover)

changes.Change: ROLLBACK.md backfill: full checkpoint table for all 28 RB-* commits with date / scope / CHG / git commit / rollback command columns. Replaced the previous 7-row table that was split between the main section and the Rollback Levels section (RB-008 was misplaced).
changes.Rollback: `git revert RB-029` reverts ROLLBACK.md (but you lose the rollback chain — only do this in emergencies)

rollback_levels.title: Content correction
rollback_levels.body:
Use when only wording, task status, or metadata is wrong.

Action:
- Edit the affected Markdown entry.
- Add a new `CHG-*` entry explaining the correction.

rollback_levels.title: Single change rollback
rollback_levels.body:
Use when one implementation or content change should be undone.

Action:
- Use `git revert <commit-hash>` if the change was committed.
- Update `ROLLBACK.md` with the rollback result.
- Add a `LOGBOOK.md` entry.

| RB-008 | 2026-07-08 | CHG-008 Phase 3 build kickoff: `mvp.html` v0.1 skeleton (4 tabs + three.js CubeSat + atlas cards + orbit rings + sandbox form) + DEC-005 inline subsystem taxonomy + SAT-006 → In Progress | CHG-008 | (this commit) | `git revert <this-commit>` + delete `mvp.html` |

rollback_levels.title: Phase rollback
rollback_levels.body:
Use when a whole phase direction is rejected.

Action:
- Identify all `CHG-*` entries in that phase.
- Revert their commits in reverse chronological order.
- Move affected kanban tasks back to `Backlog` or `Next`.
- Add a decision entry explaining why the phase was rolled back.
